'''''Korolev''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that served as a medical vessel in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]].

==History==
''Korolev'' transferred wounded from the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|evacuation]] of [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]] to the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']]. The transfer was [[Skirmish near Brigia|interrupted]] by the arrival of the Imperial Nebulon-B frigate [[Warspite (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Warspite'']] which began launching [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]]. The actions of Red Squadron, and particularly [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], protected the transfer and all Rebel ships escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

===Legacy===
A [[Redemption scenario|simulation]] based on guarding the corvette would later be part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] training program. When [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] reformed [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], this test was used as one of the benchmarks for candidates to enter the squadron.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
*''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{C|In simulator}}
